sections.paragraph:
Original: קלה

Transliteration: qâlâh

Phonetic: kaw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to roast, parch
    1. (Qal) to roast
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be burned
      2. burning (participle)

Origin: a primitive root [rather identical with H7034 through the idea of shrinkage by heat]

TWOT entry: 2023

Part(s) of speech: Verb
